name: Fnf Arrow Funk: “Just a few questions about your family”
description:
I QUESTION MY ROOMMATE’S FAMILY TREE

After meeting both Bidu’s and Barbara’s family they have many, many questions for them, because a lot of things don’t add up to them

(If you want to see more fnf bots like this, suggest them down in the comments, Guh!)
